'''mothadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elasticoviscous|elasticoviscous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elasticoviscous|elasticoviscous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mothadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothadhithi|mothadhithi]] || [[word:mothadhiji|mothadhiji]] || [[word:mothadhishi|mothadhishi]] || [[word:mothadhiki|mothadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothadhuthuthu|mothadhuthuthu]] || [[word:mothadhujuju|mothadhujuju]] || [[word:mothadhushushu|mothadhushushu]] || [[word:mothadhukuku|mothadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothadhuthu|mothadhuthu]] || [[word:mothadhuju|mothadhuju]] || [[word:mothadhushu|mothadhushu]] || [[word:mothadhuku|mothadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothadhufthuf|mothadhufthuf]] || [[word:mothadhufjuf|mothadhufjuf]] || [[word:mothadhufshuf|mothadhufshuf]] || [[word:mothadhufkuf|mothadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothadhethe|mothadhethe]] || [[word:mothadheje|mothadheje]] || [[word:mothadheshe|mothadheshe]] || [[word:mothadheke|mothadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothadhothotho|mothadhothotho]] || [[word:mothadhojojo|mothadhojojo]] || [[word:mothadhoshosho|mothadhoshosho]] || [[word:mothadhokoko|mothadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothadhotho|mothadhotho]] || [[word:mothadhojo|mothadhojo]] || [[word:mothadhosho|mothadhosho]] || [[word:mothadhoko|mothadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothadhofthof|mothadhofthof]] || [[word:mothadhofjof|mothadhofjof]] || [[word:mothadhofshof|mothadhofshof]] || [[word:mothadhofkof|mothadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfthĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfjĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfshĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfkĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfthĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfjĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfshĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfkĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfthĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfjĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfshĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothadhĂŻfkĂŻf|mothadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothadhĂŠthĂŠ|mothadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mothadhĂŠjĂŠ|mothadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mothadhĂŠshĂŠ|mothadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mothadhĂŠkĂŠ|mothadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothadhathatha|mothadhathatha]] || [[word:mothadhajaja|mothadhajaja]] || [[word:mothadhashasha|mothadhashasha]] || [[word:mothadhakaka|mothadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothadhatha|mothadhatha]] || [[word:mothadhaja|mothadhaja]] || [[word:mothadhasha|mothadhasha]] || [[word:mothadhaka|mothadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothadhafthaf|mothadhafthaf]] || [[word:mothadhafjaf|mothadhafjaf]] || [[word:mothadhafshaf|mothadhafshaf]] || [[word:mothadhafkaf|mothadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mothadhasha|mothadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mothadhshĂ«asha|mothadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mothadhroasha|mothadhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mothadhmuasha|mothadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mothadhyaasha|mothadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomothadhnkshĂ«asha|gomothadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomothadhnkroasha|gomothadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomothadhnkmuasha|gomothadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomothadhnkyaasha|gomothadhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mothathadhasha|mothathadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mothathadhshĂ«asha|mothathadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mothathadhroasha|mothathadhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mothathadhmuasha|mothathadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mothathadhyaasha|mothathadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomothathadhnkshĂ«asha|gomothathadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomothathadhnkroasha|gomothathadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomothathadhnkmuasha|gomothathadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomothathadhnkyaasha|gomothathadhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:methĂŠdhasha|methĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:methĂŠdhshĂ«asha|methĂŠdhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:methĂŠdhroasha|methĂŠdhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:methĂŠdhmuasha|methĂŠdhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:methĂŠdhyaasha|methĂŠdhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomethĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha|gomethĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomethĂŠdhnkroasha|gomethĂŠdhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomethĂŠdhnkmuasha|gomethĂŠdhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomethĂŠdhnkyaasha|gomethĂŠdhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mothfadhasha|mothfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mothfadhshĂ«asha|mothfadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mothfadhroasha|mothfadhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mothfadhmuasha|mothfadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mothfadhyaasha|mothfadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomothfadhnkshĂ«asha|gomothfadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomothfadhnkroasha|gomothfadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomothfadhnkmuasha|gomothfadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomothfadhnkyaasha|gomothfadhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
